title: Peter Gillgasch
text: Home * People * Peter Gillgasch Peter Gillgasch [1] Peter W. Gillgasch , a German computer scientist, software developer and former computer chess programmer. In 1992, while undergraduate at University of Karlsruhe he developed the Pascal predecessor of a computer chess program which later evolved to DarkThought after he joined forces with Ernst A. Heinz in 1993 and later in 1994 with Markus Gille . Gillgasch created rotated bitboards with a different diagonal mapping than Robert Hyatt , later described by Heinz [2] . He left the DarkThought team in April 1996 [3] [4] . Contents 1 Forum Posts 1.1 1995 ... 1.2 2000 ... 2 External Links 3 References Forum Posts [ edit ] 1995 ...
